updates.title: Autonomous controller: candidate_source_model_pass
updates.detail: PlatformGate PASS; candidate-source retry/quarantine model verified

updates.title: PlatformGate child QA active: Plex client decision QA
updates.detail: Latest child QA line: [2026-06-13T07:08:43Z] [PASS] Decision passed: metadata=46093 title=The Bourne Identity

updates.title: Watchdog-of-watchdog sentinel added
updates.detail: Added Node sentinel triggered by dashboard and mirror workers so disabled watchdogs, stale locks, stale checkpoints, and stale dashboard/mirror status self-detect and recover without blocking on PowerShell.

updates.title: Redundant sentinel added
updates.detail: Added JasonOS_Prime_Sentinel as watchdog-of-watchdog to re-enable stalled tasks, retrigger recovery, and publish alert state when self-heal cannot resolve.

updates.title: Dashboard stall recovered
updates.detail: Watchdog task was re-enabled, stale PlatformGate locks were backed up and removed, controller was retriggered, and InstantStatus was made non-recursive.

updates.title: Five-minute watchdog and retry hardening applied
updates.detail: Installed the watchdog scheduled task, added five-minute stall detection, and changed repeated transient PlatformGate reviews to retry/backoff instead of BLOCKED_LOOP.

updates.title: Watchdog and stall detector added
updates.detail: Created a persistent stall detector, dashboard-triggered fallback, watchdog status files, and Stall Risk dashboard column.

updates.title: Controller schedule re-enabled
updates.detail: Autonomous controller task was enabled and relaunched so future progress does not depend on Codex.

updates.title: Autonomous progress visibility added
updates.detail: Dashboard now shows recent achievements, heartbeat freshness, stall-watch state, and whether Codex is needed.

updates.title: Phone-readable dashboard published
updates.detail: Generated a rendered HTML dashboard and mirrored it to the public repository.

updates.title: Controller/PlatformGate reliability patched
updates.detail: Bounded checkpoint publishing, child-active detection, orphan-lock recovery, and 15-minute stale-progress recovery were added.

updates.title: PlatformGate cycle relaunched locally
updates.detail: Detached PlatformGate restarted with catalogue expansion still disabled.
